sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 17g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: 17g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 3.1g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.
sections.subtitleText: 3.1g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 28g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: 28g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 28% daily value, vitamin a at 12% daily value stand out most. that is only mild support overall.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 28% daily value, vitamin a at 12% daily value stand out most. that is only mild support overall.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 51% daily value, zinc at 19% daily value stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 51% daily value, zinc at 19% daily value stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: easy protein delivery for normal diets because dairy gets real credit for convenience. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: not everyone tolerates dairy well because that is a real use-case limitation. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

closing.summary: Mozzarella has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
